   600→{
   601→  register const MagickInfo

   603→
   604→  /*

   620→            name);

   628→    magick_info=(const MagickInfo *) GetRootValueFromSplayTree(magick_list);
   629→  if (magick_info == (const MagickInfo *) NULL)
   630→    magick_info=(const MagickInfo *) GetValueFromSplayTree(magick_list,name);
   631→  return(magick_info);

   682→MagickExport const MagickInfo **GetMagickInfoList(const char *pattern,

   686→    **formats;

   688→  register const MagickInfo
   689→    *p;

   691→  register ssize_t
   692→    i;
   693→
   694→  /*
   695→    Allocate magick list.
   696→  */
   697→  assert(pattern != (char *) NULL);
   698→  (void) LogMagickEvent(TraceEvent,GetMagickModule(),"%s",pattern);
   699→  assert(number_formats != (size_t *) NULL);
   700→  *number_formats=0;
   701→  p=GetMagickInfo("*",exception);
   702→  if (p == (const MagickInfo *) NULL)
   703→    return((const MagickInfo **) NULL);
   704→  formats=(const MagickInfo **) AcquireQuantumMemory((size_t)
   705→    GetNumberOfNodesInSplayTree(magick_list)+1UL,sizeof(*formats));
   706→  if (formats == (const MagickInfo **) NULL)
   707→    return((const MagickInfo **) NULL);
   708→  /*
   709→    Generate magick list.
   710→  */
   711→  LockSemaphoreInfo(magick_semaphore);
   712→  ResetSplayTreeIterator(magick_list);
   713→  p=(const MagickInfo *) GetNextValueInSplayTree(magick_list);
   714→  for (i=0; p != (const MagickInfo *) NULL; )
   715→  {
   716→    if ((GetMagickStealth(p) == MagickFalse) &&
   717→        (GlobExpression(p->name,pattern,MagickFalse) != MagickFalse))
   718→      formats[i++]=p;
   719→    p=(const MagickInfo *) GetNextValueInSplayTree(magick_list);
   720→  }
   721→  UnlockSemaphoreInfo(magick_semaphore);
   722→  qsort((void *) formats,(size_t) i,sizeof(*formats),MagickInfoCompare);
   723→  formats[i]=(MagickInfo *) NULL;
   724→  *number_formats=(size_t) i;
   725→  return(formats);
   726→}

   992→static void *DestroyMagickNode(void *magick_info)
   993→{
   994→  register MagickInfo
   995→    *p;
   996→
   997→  p=(MagickInfo *) magick_info;
   998→  if (p->module != (char *) NULL)
   999→    p->module=DestroyString(p->module);
  1000→  if (p->note != (char *) NULL)
  1001→    p->note=DestroyString(p->note);
  1002→  if (p->mime_type != (char *) NULL)
  1003→    p->mime_type=DestroyString(p->mime_type);
  1004→  if (p->version != (char *) NULL)
  1005→    p->version=DestroyString(p->version);
  1006→  if (p->description != (char *) NULL)
  1007→    p->description=DestroyString(p->description);
  1008→  if (p->name != (char *) NULL)
  1009→    p->name=DestroyString(p->name);
  1010→  if (p->semaphore != (SemaphoreInfo *) NULL)
  1011→    RelinquishSemaphoreInfo(&p->semaphore);
  1012→  return(RelinquishMagickMemory(p));
  1013→}
  1014→
  1015→static MagickBooleanType IsMagickTreeInstantiated(ExceptionInfo *exception)
  1016→{
  1017→  if (magick_list_initialized == MagickFalse)
  1018→    {
  1019→      if (magick_semaphore == (SemaphoreInfo *) NULL)
  1020→        ActivateSemaphoreInfo(&magick_semaphore);
  1021→      LockSemaphoreInfo(magick_semaphore);
  1022→      if (magick_list_initialized == MagickFalse)
  1023→        {
  1024→          magick_list=NewSplayTree(CompareSplayTreeString,(void *(*)(void *))
  1025→            NULL,DestroyMagickNode);
  1026→          if (magick_list == (SplayTreeInfo *) NULL)
  1027→            ThrowFatalException(ResourceLimitFatalError,
  1028→              "MemoryAllocationFailed");
  1029→#if defined(MAGICKCORE_MODULES_SUPPORT)
  1030→          (void) GetModuleInfo((char *) NULL,exception);
  1031→#endif
  1032→#if !defined(MAGICKCORE_BUILD_MODULES)
  1033→          RegisterStaticModules();
  1034→#endif
  1035→          magick_list_initialized=MagickTrue;
  1036→        }
  1037→      UnlockSemaphoreInfo(magick_semaphore);
  1038→    }
  1039→  return(magick_list != (SplayTreeInfo *) NULL ? MagickTrue : MagickFalse);
  1040→}

  1103→MagickExport MagickBooleanType ListMagickInfo(FILE *file,
  1104→  ExceptionInfo *exception)
  1105→{
  1106→  const MagickInfo
  1107→    **magick_info;
  1108→
  1109→  register ssize_t
  1110→    i;
  1111→
  1112→  size_t
  1113→    number_formats;
  1114→
  1115→  ssize_t
  1116→    j;
  1117→
  1118→  if (file == (FILE *) NULL)
  1119→    file=stdout;
  1120→  magick_info=GetMagickInfoList("*",&number_formats,exception);
  1121→  if (magick_info == (const MagickInfo **) NULL)
  1122→    return(MagickFalse);
  1123→  ClearMagickException(exception);
  1124→#if !defined(MAGICKCORE_MODULES_SUPPORT)
  1125→  (void) FormatLocaleFile(file,"   Format  Mode  Description\n");
  1126→#else
  1127→  (void) FormatLocaleFile(file,"   Format  Module    Mode  Description\n");
  1128→#endif
  1129→  (void) FormatLocaleFile(file,
  1130→    "--------------------------------------------------------"
  1131→    "-----------------------\n");
  1132→  for (i=0; i < (ssize_t) number_formats; i++)
  1133→  {
  1134→    if (GetMagickStealth(magick_info[i]) != MagickFalse)
  1135→      continue;
  1136→    (void) FormatLocaleFile(file,"%9s%c ",
  1137→      magick_info[i]->name != (char *) NULL ? magick_info[i]->name : "",
  1138→      GetMagickBlobSupport(magick_info[i]) != MagickFalse ? '*' : ' ');
  1139→#if defined(MAGICKCORE_MODULES_SUPPORT)
  1140→    {
  1141→      char
  1142→        module[MagickPathExtent];
  1143→
  1144→      *module='\0';
  1145→      if (magick_info[i]->module != (char *) NULL)
  1146→        (void) CopyMagickString(module,magick_info[i]->module,MagickPathExtent);
  1147→      (void) ConcatenateMagickString(module,"          ",MagickPathExtent);
  1148→      module[9]='\0';
  1149→      (void) FormatLocaleFile(file,"%9s ",module);
  1150→    }
  1151→#endif
  1152→    (void) FormatLocaleFile(file,"%c%c%c ",magick_info[i]->decoder ? 'r' : '-',
  1153→      magick_info[i]->encoder ? 'w' : '-',magick_info[i]->encoder != NULL &&
  1154→      GetMagickAdjoin(magick_info[i]) != MagickFalse ? '+' : '-');
  1155→    if (magick_info[i]->description != (char *) NULL)
  1156→      (void) FormatLocaleFile(file,"  %s",magick_info[i]->description);
  1157→    if (magick_info[i]->version != (char *) NULL)
  1158→      (void) FormatLocaleFile(file," (%s)",magick_info[i]->version);
  1159→    (void) FormatLocaleFile(file,"\n");
  1160→    if (magick_info[i]->note != (char *) NULL)
  1161→      {
  1162→        char
  1163→          **text;
  1164→
  1165→        text=StringToList(magick_info[i]->note);
  1166→        if (text != (char **) NULL)
  1167→          {
  1168→            for (j=0; text[j] != (char *) NULL; j++)
  1169→            {
  1170→              (void) FormatLocaleFile(file,"           %s\n",text[j]);
  1171→              text[j]=DestroyString(text[j]);
  1172→            }
  1173→            text=(char **) RelinquishMagickMemory(text);
  1174→          }
  1175→      }
  1176→  }
  1177→  (void) FormatLocaleFile(file,"\n* native blob support\n");
  1178→  (void) FormatLocaleFile(file,"r read support\n");
  1179→  (void) FormatLocaleFile(file,"w write support\n");
  1180→  (void) FormatLocaleFile(file,"+ support for multiple images\n");
  1181→  (void) fflush(file);
  1182→  magick_info=(const MagickInfo **) RelinquishMagickMemory((void *)
  1183→    magick_info);
  1184→  return(MagickTrue);
  1185→}

  1266→/*
  1267→%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
  1268→%                                                                             %

  1270→%                                                                             %
  1271→%   M a g i c k C o r e G e n e s i s                                         %

  1274→%                                                                             %
  1275→%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
  1276→%
  1277→%  MagickCoreGenesis() initializes the MagickCore environment.
  1278→%
  1279→%  The format of the MagickCoreGenesis function is:
  1280→%
  1281→%      MagickCoreGenesis(const char *path,
  1282→%        const MagickBooleanType establish_signal_handlers)
  1283→%
  1284→%  A description of each parameter follows:
  1285→%
  1286→%    o path: the execution path of the current ImageMagick client.
  1287→%
  1288→%    o establish_signal_handlers: set to MagickTrue to use MagickCore's own
  1289→%      signal handlers for common signals.
  1290→%
  1291→*/
  1292→
  1293→static SignalHandler *SetMagickSignalHandler(int signal_number,
  1294→  SignalHandler *handler)
  1295→{
  1296→#if defined(MAGICKCORE_HAVE_SIGACTION) && defined(MAGICKCORE_HAVE_SIGEMPTYSET)
  1297→  int
  1298→    status;
  1299→
  1300→  sigset_t
  1301→    mask;
  1302→
  1303→  struct sigaction
  1304→    action,
  1305→    previous_action;
  1306→
  1307→  sigemptyset(&mask);
  1308→  sigaddset(&mask,signal_number);
  1309→  sigprocmask(SIG_BLOCK,&mask,NULL);
  1310→  action.sa_mask=mask;
  1311→  action.sa_handler=handler;
  1312→  action.sa_flags=0;
  1313→#if defined(SA_INTERRUPT)
  1314→  action.sa_flags|=SA_INTERRUPT;
  1315→#endif
  1316→  status=sigaction(signal_number,&action,&previous_action);
  1317→  if (status < 0)
  1318→    return(SIG_ERR);
  1319→  sigprocmask(SIG_UNBLOCK,&mask,NULL);
  1320→  return(previous_action.sa_handler);
  1321→#else
  1322→  return(signal(signal_number,handler));
  1323→#endif
  1324→}
  1325→
  1326→static void MagickSignalHandler(int signal_number)
  1327→{
  1328→  if (magickcore_signal_in_progress != MagickFalse)
  1329→    (void) SetMagickSignalHandler(signal_number,signal_handlers[signal_number]);
  1330→  magickcore_signal_in_progress=MagickTrue;
  1331→  AsynchronousResourceComponentTerminus();
  1332→#if defined(SIGQUIT)
  1333→  if (signal_number == SIGQUIT)
  1334→    abort();
  1335→#endif
  1336→#if defined(SIGABRT)
  1337→  if (signal_number == SIGABRT)
  1338→    abort();
  1339→#endif
  1340→#if defined(SIGBUS)
  1341→  if (signal_number == SIGBUS)
  1342→    abort();
  1343→#endif
  1344→#if defined(SIGFPE)
  1345→  if (signal_number == SIGFPE)
  1346→    abort();
  1347→#endif
  1348→#if defined(SIGXCPU)
  1349→  if (signal_number == SIGXCPU)
  1350→    abort();
  1351→#endif
  1352→#if defined(SIGXFSZ)
  1353→  if (signal_number == SIGXFSZ)
  1354→    abort();
  1355→#endif
  1356→#if defined(SIGSEGV)
  1357→  if (signal_number == SIGSEGV)
  1358→    abort();
  1359→#endif
  1360→#if !defined(MAGICKCORE_HAVE__EXIT)
  1361→  exit(signal_number);
  1362→#else
  1363→#if defined(SIGHUP)
  1364→  if (signal_number == SIGHUP)
  1365→    _exit(signal_number);
  1366→#endif
  1367→#if defined(SIGINT)
  1368→  if (signal_number == SIGINT)
  1369→    _exit(signal_number);
  1370→#endif
  1371→#if defined(SIGBUS)
  1372→  if (signal_number == SIGBUS)
  1373→    _exit(signal_number);
  1374→#endif
  1375→#if defined(MAGICKCORE_HAVE_RAISE)
  1376→  if (signal_handlers[signal_number] != MagickSignalHandler)
  1377→    raise(signal_number);
  1378→#endif
  1379→  _exit(signal_number);  /* do not invoke registered atexit() methods */
  1380→#endif
  1381→}
  1382→
  1383→static SignalHandler *RegisterMagickSignalHandler(int signal_number)
  1384→{
  1385→  SignalHandler
  1386→    *handler;
  1387→
  1388→  handler=SetMagickSignalHandler(signal_number,MagickSignalHandler);
  1389→  if (handler == SIG_ERR)
  1390→    return(handler);
  1391→  if (handler != SIG_DFL)
  1392→    handler=SetMagickSignalHandler(signal_number,handler);
  1393→  else
  1394→    (void) LogMagickEvent(ConfigureEvent,GetMagickModule(),
  1395→      "Register handler for signal: %d",signal_number);
  1396→  return(handler);
  1397→}

  1399→MagickExport void MagickCoreGenesis(const char *path,

  1401→{

  1403→    *events,

  1467→#if defined(SIGHUP)
  1468→      if (signal_handlers[SIGHUP] == (SignalHandler *) NULL)
  1469→        signal_handlers[SIGHUP]=RegisterMagickSignalHandler(SIGHUP);
  1470→#endif
  1471→#if defined(SIGINT)
  1472→      if (signal_handlers[SIGINT] == (SignalHandler *) NULL)
  1473→        signal_handlers[SIGINT]=RegisterMagickSignalHandler(SIGINT);
  1474→#endif
  1475→#if defined(SIGQUIT)
  1476→      if (signal_handlers[SIGQUIT] == (SignalHandler *) NULL)

  1479→#if defined(SIGTERM)

  1594→%
  1595→%  RegisterMagickInfo() adds attributes for a particular image format to the

  1610→MagickExport MagickBooleanType RegisterMagickInfo(MagickInfo *magick_info)

  1630→/*
  1631→%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
  1632→%                                                                             %
  1633→%                                                                             %
  1634→%                                                                             %

  1636→%                                                                             %
  1637→%                                                                             %
  1638→%                                                                             %
  1639→%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
  1640→%
  1641→%  SetMagickPrecision() sets the maximum number of significant digits to be
  1642→%  printed.
  1643→%
  1644→%  An input argument of 0 returns the current precision setting.
  1645→%
  1646→%  A negative value forces the precision to reset to a default value according
  1647→%  to the environment variable "MAGICK_PRECISION", the current 'policy'
  1648→%  configuration setting, or the default value of '6', in that order.
  1649→%
  1650→%  The format of the SetMagickPrecision method is:
  1651→%
  1652→%      int SetMagickPrecision(const int precision)
  1653→%
  1654→%  A description of each parameter follows:
  1655→%
  1656→%    o precision: set the maximum number of significant digits to be printed.
  1657→%
  1658→*/
  1659→MagickExport int SetMagickPrecision(const int precision)
  1660→{
  1661→#define MagickPrecision  6
  1662→
  1663→  static int
  1664→    magick_precision = 0;
  1665→
  1666→  (void) LogMagickEvent(TraceEvent,GetMagickModule(),"...");
  1667→  if (precision > 0)
  1668→    magick_precision=precision;
  1669→  if ((precision < 0) || (magick_precision == 0))
  1670→    {
  1671→      char
  1672→        *limit;
  1673→

  1677→      magick_precision=MagickPrecision;

  1700→%
  1701→%  UnregisterMagickInfo() removes a name from the magick info list.  It returns
  1702→%  MagickFalse if the name does not exist in the list otherwise MagickTrue.
  1703→%
  1704→%  The format of the UnregisterMagickInfo method is:
  1705→%
  1706→%      MagickBooleanType UnregisterMagickInfo(const char *name)
  1707→%
  1708→%  A description of each parameter follows:
  1709→%
  1710→%    o name: a character string that represents the image format we are
  1711→%      looking for.
  1712→%
  1713→*/
  1714→MagickExport MagickBooleanType UnregisterMagickInfo(const char *name)
  1715→{
  1716→  register const MagickInfo
  1717→    *p;
  1718→
  1719→  MagickBooleanType
  1720→    status;
  1721→
  1722→  assert(name != (const char *) NULL);
  1723→  if (magick_list == (SplayTreeInfo *) NULL)
  1724→    return(MagickFalse);
  1725→  if (GetNumberOfNodesInSplayTree(magick_list) == 0)
  1726→    return(MagickFalse);
  1727→  LockSemaphoreInfo(magick_semaphore);
  1728→  ResetSplayTreeIterator(magick_list);
  1729→  p=(const MagickInfo *) GetNextValueInSplayTree(magick_list);
  1730→  while (p != (const MagickInfo *) NULL)
  1731→  {
  1732→    if (LocaleCompare(p->name,name) == 0)
  1733→      break;
  1734→    p=(const MagickInfo *) GetNextValueInSplayTree(magick_list);
  1735→  }
  1736→  status=DeleteNodeByValueFromSplayTree(magick_list,p);
  1737→  UnlockSemaphoreInfo(magick_semaphore);
  1738→  return(status);
  1739→}
